title: Notifications - Update failed OFF
scenario: No notification appears when a device software update fails and the Software Update notification is turned off in App Settings.
steps: 1. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
2. Turn OFF the 'Software Update notification' toggle.
3. Trigger a device software update that is expected to fail.
4. Observe whether any notification appears upon the update failure.
expected: No notification should pop up upon update failure.
